Your business on autopilot.
Powered by intelligent AI.

RollFlow builds custom AI agents and automation systems that capture leads, answer customers, close deals, and run operations 24/7 — so your team focuses on what humans do best.

What We Build

Custom AI systems built around your business.

Every business runs different. We don't sell templates — we map your workflow, find the bottlenecks, and deploy AI agents that actually move the needle.

01

AI Sales Agents

Custom chatbots that qualify leads, book calls, and follow up — across web, SMS, Instagram, and Messenger. Trained on your offer, your tone.

02

Customer Support Automation

Voice and text AI that handles 80%+ of support tickets instantly, escalating only what truly needs a human. Response times drop to seconds.

03

Workflow Automation

Connect your tools — CRM, email, calendar, payments, spreadsheets — into one seamless system. No more copy-paste. No more dropped balls.

04

Lead Generation Engines

AI-powered outbound: scraping, enriching, personalizing, sending, and tracking replies — building your pipeline while you sleep.

05

Custom AI Integrations

GPT, Claude, Gemini wired into the apps you already use. Smart docs, intelligent search, content generation — built into your stack.

06

Analytics & Reporting

Automated dashboards and AI-driven insights. Stop digging through data — get the story your numbers are telling, delivered to your inbox.

How It Works

From first call to fully deployed in weeks.

No bloated retainers. No vague promises. A clear process that gets your AI systems working — fast.

01

Discover

Free strategy call. We map your workflow, identify the highest-leverage automations, and show you exactly where AI saves time and makes money.

02

Design

We architect your custom AI system — agents, integrations, data flow, escalation rules — and walk you through it before anything ships.

03

Deploy

We build it, train it on your business, integrate with your tools, and test end-to-end. Live in your environment within weeks.

04

Optimize

AI gets smarter with feedback. We monitor performance, refine prompts, adjust flows, and scale — making the system better every month.

Pricing

Simple, transparent pricing.

No surprise invoices. No vague hourly rates. Pick the tier that fits where you are, upgrade anytime.

Starter
$497 / mo

Perfect for small businesses ready to automate their first workflow and stop losing leads.

  • 1 custom AI agent (chat or voice)
  • Lead capture + CRM integration
  • 1 automated workflow (email / SMS)
  • Monthly performance review
  • Email support
Get Started →
Growth
$997 / mo

For growing teams that need a full automation stack — sales, support, and operations running on AI.

  • Up to 3 custom AI agents
  • Full CRM + calendar + payment integration
  • Unlimited automated workflows
  • AI lead gen engine (outbound)
  • Bi-weekly strategy calls
  • Priority Slack support
  • Monthly optimization sprints
Get Started →
Enterprise
Custom pricing

Full-service AI transformation for teams with complex workflows, multiple departments, or high-volume operations.

  • Unlimited AI agents & integrations
  • Custom model fine-tuning
  • Dedicated account manager
  • SLA with guaranteed uptime
  • Onsite onboarding available
  • Quarterly executive reviews
Book a Call →
Get Started

Tell us where you're stuck. We'll show you what's possible. No pitch, no pressure — just a clear plan.
